title: ODYSSEY COMMUNITY COUNSELING - 211info
text: EMERGENCE ODYSSEY ODYSSEY COMMUNITY COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health counseling around topics such as addiction, PTSD, grief and loss, and anxiety and mood disorders. Individuals will have an assessment prior to beginning services. 2149 Centennial Plaza Suite 4 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Counseling sessions: Varies by service Email (541) 741-7107 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 741-7107 Emergency (541) 607-4821 After-hours Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and most private insurances. Slding scale fees DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 2 blocks from LTD on Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Services: Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Marriage and Relationships Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MERIDIAN GAMBLING TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
